title: duplicate accountId keys in chat_push slice silently drop one entry
description: In push_subscription_set, chat_push_map.insert() is called in a loop over &[(&str, ChatPushConfig)]. If the caller passes two entries with the same accountId (e.g., by mistake or a copy-paste error), the first entry is silently overwritten. No validation or error is returned. The resulting request will have one fewer chatPush account than the caller intended. Fix: check for duplicates before inserting and return ClientError::InvalidArgument if found.
